candidate_definition_hints.text: Dockerfile best-practices for writing production-worthy Docker images.

Writing production-worthy Dockerfiles is, unfortunately, not as simple as you would imagine. Most Docker images in the wild fail here, and even professionals often[[1]](https://github.com/docker-library/postgres/issues/175) get[[2]](https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/issue…
